_comment: VLTIMA MATERIA institutional census, made executable. The rich win because civilization's pillars (a legal org, a family office, a PR machine) stand behind them; this ranks those same pillars rebuilt as AI-run ORGANS so the idle fleet can build them continuously. Mirror of revenue-ladder.json: generate-organ-backlog.py reads this and emits bounded, lockless organ-build tasks toward each organ's next maturity band. Identity/levers are DERIVED here, never pinned in code. Each organ is a FRACTAL: macro (a platform anyone can hold) + micro (Anthony's own instance). Build stages: scaffold(<30%) -> building(30-60%) -> maturing(60-90%) -> mature(>=90, no build tasks). Organ artifacts are authored into the limen repo under organs/<pillar>/ (same proven home as the Studium) so dispatch never hits a dead clone; repo-specific product code is handled by the revenue/coverage generators.
spine: Institutional weight for one person, then anyone — the prosthesis for human weakness. Not tips; institutions.

maturity_stages.building: 30-59% — close the gap to a usable institution; wire it self-feeding

organs.rival: a top-tier litigation firm (the Cochran standard)
organs.domain_map: Member=client/party; Mandate=claim/matter; Standing=case posture; Standard=statute/precedent/rubric; Governance=the firm's process + ethics wall
organs.macro: a legal-institution platform any pro-se or under-resourced person can hold
organs.micro: Anthony's active ADA employment matter run with a top-firm's institutional weight, AUGMENTING attorney Micah Longo (never replacing counsel, never practicing law)
organs.first_artifact: a case-posture brief + evidence/chain-of-custody index for the live matter, packaged as a framework deck to show Micah
organs.note: THE FLAGSHIP he named. Augments real counsel; does NOT give legal advice or practice law.

organs.whose_hand: mine (bank/KYC + actually moving money is his)
organs.rival: a billionaire's family office (Musk/Bezos-tier financial apparatus)
organs.domain_map: Member=account/entity; Mandate=goal/allocation; Standing=net position; Standard=tax/compliance rule; Governance=the office's controls
organs.micro: Anthony's own disbursement (product revenue -> personal + institutional via payrail) + wealth/portfolio + tax automation
organs.first_artifact: a personal balance-sheet + cashflow + payrail disbursement map run on his real numbers
organs.note: scale the-invisible-ledger from a B2B CPA tool into a personal family office

organs.whose_hand: mine (D2L login + cadence confirm is his)
organs.rival: an elite private academy + the alt-education billion-$ gap
organs.domain_map: the proven Learner/Quest/Progression/Rubric/Institution skin over the 5-primitive kernel
organs.micro: ENC1101 + Derek's narrative workshop + the homeschool engine

organs.note: already 60-80% in edu-organism; drive to 90 and fire the alt-ed thesis

organs.rival: a cross-platform media empire (the carrier-wave position: Bowie/Tarantino of systems)
organs.domain_map: Member=audience; Mandate=message; Standing=reach; Standard=editorial voice; Governance=POSSE rules
organs.macro: the carrier-wave infrastructure that speaks in every channel's idiom at once
organs.micro: ORGANVM's own public face + product launch posts
organs.first_artifact: fire the essay -> kerygma pipeline on ONE real event, end to end (drafts only; his hand on publish)
organs.note: thesis complete, distribution pipeline built but NEVER fired

organs.rival: a constitutional state / a foundation's governance office
organs.domain_map: the Roman cursus-honorum office sequence expressed as executable rules
organs.macro: a portable governance-as-code open standard anyone can adopt

organs.first_artifact: operationalize ONE cvrsvs-honorvm rule as an executable validator
organs.note: rules operationalized via validate-seed.py + governance-organ.py beat; aerarium--res-publica infra partial

organs.domain_map: Member=client; Mandate=engagement; Standing=delivery state; Standard=quality bar; Governance=intake->delivery process

organs.note: working manual prototypes; not yet autonomic or scaled back to self

organs.domain_map: Member=work; Mandate=exhibition; Standing=archive state; Standard=aesthetic rubric; Governance=curation

organs.domain_map: Member=person/contact; Mandate=relationship; Standing=tie strength; Standard=reciprocity norm; Governance=community rules
organs.macro: community + relationship infrastructure anyone can hold

power_snapshot.binding_constraint: SUPPLY of high-value work, not capacity — these organs ARE the supply

your_levers: card-0186 Santander fraud hold — keystone: the whole stack's billing rides on it (one call clears it; also frees Anthropic/GitHub autopay)
financial identity — receiving real money (bank/KYC for a payout rail or a signed deal) is genuinely yours
the send / the signature — outbound emails and any contract: I draft, you send/sign (reversible-only invariant)
institutional logins — D2L (education), and privileged/filing acts with Micah (legal)
